one_liner: RKLB up 4.8% in Wyckoff Accumulation Phase B (3/5 signals) but RSI at 26.8 is deeply oversold and MACD remains bearish — accumulation signals are present but trend hasn't reversed; wait for MACD crossover.

news_catalyst.headline: Rocket Lab Bouncing in Oversold Territory — No Specific News Catalyst
news_catalyst.summary: RKLB is up 4.8% today from very oversold levels (RSI 26.8 is the second-most oversold reading after CRCL in the watchlist). No specific company news today — the move is a technical bounce from oversold conditions. Wyckoff Accumulation Phase B with 3/5 signals suggests institutional accumulation is occurring, but negative FCF and high leverage remain fundamental concerns. The stock is in an 'accumulation watch' phase — not yet a confirmed buy.

technical.summary: RSI at 26.8 is deeply oversold — the most oversold in the watchlist after CRCL. Wyckoff shows 3/5 accumulation signals (bullish bias) but MACD remains in a bearish crossover. The 4.8% bounce today on only 1.18x volume is a relief rally, not a confirmed trend reversal. Wait for MACD to cross bullish and RSI to recover above 35-40 before adding exposure. Support at $66 is firm.

key_strengths: Neutron rocket development differentiates from Electron small-sat launcher
fundamentals.summary: Grade C fundamentals for a growth-stage space company. Rocket Lab's expansion into medium-lift launch (Neutron) and space systems is the long-term value driver, but profitability remains years away.

risks: Negative FCF and high leverage — cash burn risk if revenue growth slows
MACD still bearish despite oversold RSI — no confirmed trend reversal
Resistance at $144 is 70% above current price — long recovery path
